items.prompt: A single, perfectly rendered die, six-sided, showing the number 3 with dots, in a kawaii chibi illustration style with rounded shapes and a chroma key green background hex color #00B140. The subject fills 90% of the frame with minimal empty space, in a close-up composition. This is a single isolated subject only, with no background scene, no secondary objects, no composed scene, and no environment or setting. It features clean black outlines, vibrant saturated colors, and a hand-drawn feel reminiscent of professional Korean sticker art. No floor, no shadow, no ground element. Vibrant saturated colors, suitable for children's designs.
